---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-25"
---
```{r  Roe}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(patchwork)
source("./source_R/custom_seurat_functions.R")
if(T){
  text.size = 12
  text.angle = 45
  text.hjust = 1
  legend.position = "right"
  mytheme <- theme(plot.title = element_text(size = text.size+2,color="black",hjust = 0.5),
                   axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
                   axis.title = element_text(size = text.size,color ="black"), 
                   axis.text = element_text(size=text.size,color = "black"),
                   axis.text.x = element_text(angle = text.angle, hjust = text.hjust ), #,vjust = 0.5
                   panel.grid=element_blank(), 
                   legend.position = legend.position,
                   legend.text = element_text(size= text.size),
                   legend.title= element_text(size= text.size)
  )
}

library(readr)
meta_data <- read_csv("../data/adata_obs.csv")
dput(unique(meta_data$final_celltype))

meta_data <- meta_data%>%filter(final_celltype%in%c("CD4T_c02-LEF1", 
                                                    "CD4T_c03-ITM2A", 
                                                    "CD4T_c04-GNLY", 
                                                    "CD4T_c05-FOXP3", 
                                                    "CD4T_c01-GATA3", 
                                                    "CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK", 
                                                    "CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1", 
                                                    "CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10", 
                                                    "CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7", 
                                                    "CD8T_c05-GNLY-KLRF1"))
meta_data$final_celltype <- factor(meta_data$final_celltype,
                                   levels = c("CD4T_c02-LEF1", 
                                                    "CD4T_c03-ITM2A", 
                                                    "CD4T_c04-GNLY", 
                                                    "CD4T_c05-FOXP3", 
                                                    "CD4T_c01-GATA3", 
                                                    "CD8T_c01-CMC1-GZMK", 
                                                    "CD8T_c02-GNLY-ITGB1", 
                                                    "CD8T_c03-KLRB1-SLC4A10", 
                                                    "CD8T_c04-LEF1-CCR7", 
                                                    "CD8T_c05-GNLY-KLRF1"))
table(meta_data$final_celltype)
str(meta_data)

library(jjAnno)
useMyCol(showAll = TRUE)
jjAnno::useMyCol('zissou',5)

options(repr.plot.width = 11, repr.plot.height = 3.8)
p7 = gg.tissueDist(cellInfo.tb = meta_data,
                   meta.cluster = meta_data$final_celltype,
                   colname.patient = "sample",
                   loc = meta_data$group,
                   cuts =c(0.0000000, 0.0000001, 0.8, 1.5, 2, Inf),
                   bin.label = c("-", "+/-", "+", "++", "+++"),
                   verbose = 1,
                   z.hi.OR = 4,
                   z.hi.ROE = 2,
                   text.size = 12,
                   text_color = paletteer::paletteer_d('ggsci::category20c_d3')
)

dev.copy2pdf(file = "./output/Roe_pbmc_select.pdf",width = 12.5, height = 5)
```





## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
